subject: Overcharged on invoice INV-44821 - urgent
body:
Hi team,

We just received invoice INV-44821 for our March subscription and it shows $4,800 but our contract is $3,200/month. This is the second month in a row we've been overcharged. Please correct this and issue a credit for the difference as soon as possible. We are a long-standing Brightwave Retail customer and this is becoming frustrating.

Regards,
Priya Nair
Head of Finance, Brightwave Retail

subject: Cancelling our account at renewal
body:
Hello,

We've decided not to renew our contract when it expires next month. The platform hasn't delivered the ROI we expected and we've found an alternative. Please confirm the cancellation process and what we need to do to export our data.

Thanks,
Tom Becker
Operations Director, Nordpeak Logistics

subject: API returning 503 in production - need help
body:
Our integration against your Orders API has been returning intermittent 503 errors since this morning (around 08:00 UTC). About 15% of calls fail. Order reference ORD-99812 is one example that failed. This is impacting our checkout. Can someone from technical support look into this urgently? We're on the Enterprise plan.

Marcus Webb
Helios Cloud Platform Team

subject: Interested in adding 200 more seats
body:
Hi there,

Things are going really well with the rollout to our first team. We're now looking to expand and would like pricing for an additional 200 seats, plus the advanced analytics add-on. Could someone from your sales team reach out to discuss an enterprise agreement? Ideally a call this week.

Best,
Jordan Fox
VP Operations, Meridian Foods

subject: Extremely disappointed with support response times
body:
This is the third time I'm writing about the same issue and nobody has gotten back to me. Your support has been completely unacceptable and I'm seriously considering escalating this to your management and leaving a public review. We pay a premium for this service and expect far better. Someone needs to call me today.

Angela Cruz
Summit Parts Co.

subject: Not sure who to ask
body: Hi, we had a chat internally and there are a few things on our side we're not totally happy about. Before we decide anything we wanted to reach out and see how you'd suggest handling it. Appreciate any steer. Thanks.

body: CLICK HERE NOW to claim your FREE $$$ reward!!! Limited time only!!! Act fast before this exclusive offer expires!!! Visit http://totally-not-a-scam.biz/claim to verify your details and receive your prize!!!
